data.html:
// Gets any parameters sent along with the address of the page
const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);

// Get the value of the "l" parameter or set default value to "en"
const defaultlanguage = params.has('l') ? params.get('l') : 'en';

$(document).ready(function() {
	// AJAX request to fetch the JSON file
	$.getJSON('languages.json', function(data) {
		// Access the JSON content
		languages = data;
		selectedLanguage = defaultlanguage;
		if (defaultlanguage != 'en'){
			$("#AvailableLanguages").hide();
		}
		updateContent();
	});
});

function ShowLanguages() {
	GetListOfLanguages(283);
	$("#LanguageTitle").html("Select Language");
	$("#LanguageDropDown").show();
}

function updateContent() {
	$("#ProgramTitle").html(languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramTitle);
	$("#LabDirections").html(languages[selectedLanguage].LabDirections);
	$("#BeginButton").html(languages[selectedLanguage].BeginButton);
	$("#AnswerTitle").html(languages[selectedLanguage].AnswerTitle);
	$("#DirectionsforSub").html(languages[selectedLanguage].DirectionsforSub);
	$("#SystemMessage").html(languages[selectedLanguage].SystemMessages.one);
	$("#SubmitButton").html(languages[selectedLanguage].SubmitButton);
	$("#WordName").html(languages[selectedLanguage].WordName);
	$("#Q1").html(languages[selectedLanguage].Q1);
	$("#Q2").html(languages[selectedLanguage].Q2);
	$("#Q3").html(languages[selectedLanguage].Q3);
}

// Function triggered by onchange event
function SwitchLanguage() {
	selectedLanguage = $("#LanguageUsed").val();
	updateContent();
}

function GetListOfLanguages(x){
	$.get('/Physics/sitewide/listoflanguages.php', {ProgramID: x}, function(response) {
	  $('#LanguageDropDown').html(response);
	});
}

function initialize(){
	theCanvas = $("#CanvasOne")[0];
	ctx = theCanvas.getContext("2d");

	StarColors = new Array("#FFFFFF", "#C0C0C0", "#a1fff7", "#fffba6", "#e30f59", "#e3d7e1", "#e3dd44", "#90b2cb", "#5a6bcb", "#fffb04", "#d2fff9" );

	StarX = new Array();
	StarY = new Array();
	StarM = new Array();
	StarC = new Array();

	Radius = new Array();

	for (i = 0; i<400; i++){
		StarX[i] = Math.floor(Math.random()*900);
		StarY[i] = Math.floor(Math.random()*600);
		StarM[i] = (Math.random()*150)/100;
		StarC[i] = Math.floor(Math.random()*10);
	}

	GasGiantX = 462;
	GasGiantY = 325;

	TimerX = 600;
	TimerY = 200;
	TimerW = 300;
	TimerH = 100;
	timertime = 0;

	Status = "not done";
	RulerMessage = "Show Ruler";
	TimerMessage = "Show Timer";
	TimerStatus = "off";
	Trips = 0;
	FinalColor = "#000000";
	GenerateProblem();

}

function GenerateProblem(){
	//Planet stuff

	PlanetMass = Math.floor(Math.random()*75+15)*1.0e25;
	PlanetSizepx = Math.floor(Math.random()*10+20);
	PlanetSizem = PlanetSizepx*1.0e6;

	//Moon Stuff
	MoonMass = Math.floor(Math.random()*10+10)*1.0e22;
	MoonRadiuspx = Math.floor(Math.random()*2+2);
	OrbitRadiuspx = Math.floor(Math.random()*320+100);
	OrbitRadiusm = OrbitRadiuspx*1.0e6;
	StartX = GasGiantX-OrbitRadiuspx;
	StartY = GasGiantY;
	ForceGravity = 6.67e-11*PlanetMass*MoonMass/(Math.pow(OrbitRadiusm,2));
	Acceleration = ForceGravity/MoonMass;
	ForcePer1000 = Acceleration*1000;
	VelocitySquared = Acceleration*OrbitRadiusm;
	Speed = Math.pow(VelocitySquared, 0.5);
	OrbitCircumference = 2*Math.PI*OrbitRadiusm;
	PeriodInSeconds = OrbitCircumference/Speed;
	PeriodInHours = PeriodInSeconds/3600;
	AngularSpeed = 2*Math.PI/PeriodInHours;

	ForceGravity = 0;
	Acceleration = 0;
	ForcePer1000 = 0;
	VelocitySquared = 0;
	Speed = 0;
	OrbitCircumference = 0;
	PeriodInSeconds = 0;
	PeriodInHours = 0;
	PlanetMass = 0;
}

function LoadIt(){
	StudentName = $("#StudentName").val();
	if (StudentName == ''){
		$("#LabDirections").html(languages[selectedLanguage].ErrorWithLabDirections);
	}
	else{
		$("#LabSection").show();
		$("#OverviewSection").hide();
		d = new Date();
		starttime = d.getTime();
		StartItMoving = setInterval(drawingpart, 20);
	}
}

function ResetTimer(){
	timertime = 0;
	timerstarttime = 0;
	TimerStatus = "off";
	$("#StopTimerButton").show();
}

function StopTimer(){
	if (TimerStatus == "off"){
		TimerStatus = "running";
		d = new Date();
		timerstarttime = d.getTime();
		$("#ResetTimerButton").show();
	}
	else if (TimerStatus == "running"){
		TimerStatus = "stopped";
		$("#SpaceForAnswer").show();
		$("#StopTimerButton").hide();
	}
}

function drawingpart(){
	ctx.fillStyle = FinalColor;
	ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 925, 600);

	for (i = 0; i<400; i++){
		DrawStars(StarX[i], StarY[i], StarM[i], StarC[i]);
	}

	d = new Date();
	nowtime = d.getTime();
	elapsedtime = (nowtime - starttime)/1000;
	if (TimerStatus == "running"){
		timertime = (nowtime - timerstarttime)/1000;
	}
	YPos = GasGiantY;
	AngleTraveled = AngularSpeed*elapsedtime - Trips*2*Math.PI;

	if (AngleTraveled >= 2*Math.PI){
		Trips++;
	}
	XPos = GasGiantX + OrbitRadiuspx*Math.cos(AngleTraveled);
	if (AngleTraveled > Math.PI){
		DrawPlanet(GasGiantX, GasGiantY, PlanetSizepx);
		DrawMoon(XPos, YPos, MoonRadiuspx);
	}
	else{
		DrawMoon(XPos, YPos, MoonRadiuspx);
		DrawPlanet(GasGiantX, GasGiantY, PlanetSizepx);
	}

	if (RulerMessage == "Hide Ruler"){
		DrawRuler();
	}
	if (TimerMessage == "Hide Timer"){
		DrawTimer(TimerX, TimerY, TimerW, TimerH);
	}
}

function DrawRuler(){
	ctx.strokeStyle = "#FFFFFF";
	ctx.beginPath();
	for (i = 0; i <=45; i++){
		if (i%5 == 0){
			endmark = 40;
			temptext = i*10.0;
			WriteText(GasGiantX+i*10, GasGiantY+60, temptext,18,"#FFFFFF",0.5);
			WriteText(GasGiantX-i*10, GasGiantY+60, temptext,18,"#FFFFFF",0.5);
		}
		else{
			endmark = 20;
		}
		ctx.moveTo(GasGiantX+i*10, GasGiantY);
		ctx.lineTo(GasGiantX+i*10, GasGiantY+endmark);
		ctx.moveTo(GasGiantX-i*10, GasGiantY);
		ctx.lineTo(GasGiantX-i*10, GasGiantY+endmark);
	}
	ctx.stroke();
	WriteText(GasGiantX, GasGiantY+90, languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramWords.four, 20, "#FFFFFF", 0.5);
}

function DrawTimer(x, y, w, h){
	ctx.globalAlpha = 0.3;
	DrawRectangle(x, y, w, h, 0, "#FFFFFF", "#FFFFFF", 0);
	ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
	WriteText(x + 0.5*w, y + 0.35*h, languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramWords.five, 28, "#FFFFFF", 0.5);
	WriteText(x + 0.15*w, y + 0.3*h, languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramWords.three, 18, "#FFFFFF", 0.5);
	if (TimerStatus == "running"){
		WriteText(x + 0.85*w, y + 0.3*h, languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramWords.one, 18, "#FFFFFF", 0.5);
	}
	if (TimerStatus == "off"){
		WriteText(x + 0.85*w, y + 0.3*h, languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramWords.two, 18, "#FFFFFF", 0.5);
	}
	WriteText(x + 0.50*w, y + 0.8*h, timertime.toFixed(1) + " " + languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramWords.six, 28, "#FFFFFF", 0.5);
}

function DrawPlanet(x,y,s){
	ctx.fillStyle = "#72de00";
	ctx.strokeStyle = "#c0c0c0";
	ctx.lineWidth = 1;
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.arc(x,y,s,0,2*Math.PI);
	ctx.stroke();
	ctx.fill();
}

function DrawMoon(x,y,s){
	ctx.fillStyle = "#fdde00";
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.arc(x,y,s,0,2*Math.PI);
	ctx.fill();
}


function DrawStars(x,y,m,c){
	ctx.fillStyle = StarColors[c];
	ctx.beginPath();
	ctx.arc(x,y,m,0,2*Math.PI);
	ctx.closePath();
	ctx.fill();
}

function ToggleTools(){
	if (RulerMessage == "Hide Ruler"){
		RulerMessage = "Show Ruler";
		TimerMessage = "Show Timer";
		$("#ResetTimerButton").hide();
		$("#StopTimerButton").hide();
		$("#SystemMessage").html(languages[selectedLanguage].SystemMessages.one);
	}
	else{
		RulerMessage = "Hide Ruler";
		TimerMessage = "Hide Timer";
		$("#ResetTimerButton").show();
		$("#StopTimerButton").show();
		$("#SystemMessage").html(languages[selectedLanguage].SystemMessages.two);
	}
}

function SubmitForm(){
	PeriodInHours = (2*Math.PI/AngularSpeed);
	PeriodInSeconds = PeriodInHours*3600;
	OrbitCircumference = 2*Math.PI*OrbitRadiusm;
	Speed = OrbitCircumference/PeriodInSeconds;
	Acceleration = Math.pow(Speed, 2.0)/OrbitRadiusm;
	ForceGravity = MoonMass*Acceleration;
	PlanetMass = ForceGravity*Math.pow(OrbitRadiusm,2)/(6.67e-11*MoonMass);
	Answer1 = PeriodInHours;
	Answer2 = Speed;
	Answer3 = PlanetMass;
	clearInterval(StartItMoving);
	Response1 = $("#A1").val();
	Response2 = $("#A2").val();
	Response3 = $("#A3").val();
	if (LanguageArray.indexOf(selectedLanguage)>-1){
		Response1 = Response1.replace(/,/g, '.');
		Response2 = Response2.replace(/,/g, '.');
		Response3 = Response3.replace(/,/g, '.');
	}
	else{
		Response1 = Response1.replace(/,/g, '');
		Response2 = Response2.replace(/,/g, '');
		Response3 = Response3.replace(/,/g, '');
	}
	$("#SpaceForAnswer").hide();
	$("#SystemMessage").hide();
	$("#ResetTimerButton").hide();
	$("#StopTimerButton").hide();
	RulerMessage = "Show Ruler";
	TimerMessage = "Show Timer";

	Error1 = Math.abs(Response1 - Answer1)/Answer1*100;
	Error2 = Math.abs(Response2 - Answer2)/Answer2*100;
	Error3 = Math.abs(Response3 - Answer3)/Answer3*100;

	if (Error1 < 5 && Error2 < 5 && Error3 < 10){
		FinalErrorMessage = languages[selectedLanguage].FinalErrorMessage.Correct;
		FinalColor = "#EEFFEE";
	}
	else{
		FinalErrorMessage = languages[selectedLanguage].FinalErrorMessage.Wrong;
		FinalColor = "#FFEEEE";
	}
	drawingpart();
	FinalMessages();
}

function FinalMessages(){
	TextSeparation = 40;
	TextLocation = 50;
	TextLocationX = 450;
	BigText = 24;
	MediumText = 18;
	SmallText = 14;

	TempText = StudentName + " (" + languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramTitle + ")";
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, BigText, "#990000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = FinalErrorMessage;
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = "r = " + OrbitRadiusm.toExponential(2) + " m";
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = "T = " + PeriodInHours.toPrecision(3) + " " + languages[selectedLanguage].ProgramWords.six;
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].Q1;
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#990000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.Predicted + " = " + Response1 + ", " + languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.True + " = " + Answer1.toPrecision(3);
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + 4.0*TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].Q2;
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#990000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.Predicted + " = " + Response2 + ", " + languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.True + " = " + Answer2.toFixed(0);
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].Q3;
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#990000", 0.5);

	TextLocation = TextLocation + TextSeparation;
	TempText = languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.Predicted + " = " + Response3 + ", " + languages[selectedLanguage].OtherWords.True + " = " + Answer3.toPrecision(3);
	WriteText(TextLocationX, TextLocation, TempText, MediumText, "#000000", 0.5);

	d = new Date();
	nowtime = d.getTime();
	WriteText(800,595,nowtime,12,"#990000",0);

}
